creator: _jkrow
caption: World-class snorkeling and diving? Check. Lush rainforests and adventure? Check. Beautiful beaches? Also check. 🌴🎥 @_jkrow, T+L contributor. #traveltips #caribbeanislands

transcription.text: Stop booking the same old Caribbean vacation. There are so many islands to choose from, so let's match an underrated Caribbean island to the trip you actually want to have. If you love world-class snorkeling, laid-back beach bars, and getting around by golf cart, then you should go to Ambergris Cay in Belize. You're right next to the second largest barrier reef in the world, so you can explore Shark Ray Alley, Ho-Chan Marine Reserve, or take a scenic flight over the iconic Great Blue Hole. But if you'd rather treat beaches for lush rainforests and epic hiking, then Dominica is your island. Known as a nature island, this is the place if you love adventure. You can hike to hidden waterfalls, swim in volcanic hot springs, and take a boat down the beautiful Indian River. And finally, if scuba diving is your priority, then you need to go to Bonaire. This place is a diver's paradise, famous for its protected marine park and incredible shore diving. You can literally pull over on the side of the road, gear up, and just walk straight into some of the most pristine reefs in the world. Whether you're looking for a laid-back beach escape, a rugged jungle adventure, or the dive trip of a lifetime, there is an underrated Caribbean island out there that's perfect for you.
